message:
feat(runtime): Add PyValue.call() dispatch mechanism (partial)

Added runtime support for calling PyValue objects via __call__ dunder method:

Runtime changes:
1. Extended PyObjectVTable with __call__ field for callable protocol
2. Added PyValue.call() method for runtime dispatch to __call__
3. Updated generateVTable() to create __call__ wrapper functions

Codegen changes:
1. Added PyValue.call() dispatch generation in calls.zig
2. Replaces compile-time error with runtime call dispatch

Current limitation: The codegen detection for PyValue attributes needs
refinement. The type inferrer may not always identify callable attributes
as PyValue, causing the dispatch code to not be generated.

Test status: test_binop still fails because calls to PyValue callable
attributes (self.logger) aren't being detected by the attr_type check.

TODO: Improve type inference or add additional detection logic to identify
all cases where PyValue callable attributes are invoked.
